actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / completed higher-shell chunks001-002 are partial taste-radial C_sx/C_xx support, not PR230 source-Higgs bridge closure
conditional_surface_status: conditional-support only if a future canonical O_H/source-overlap certificate and production C_ss/C_sH/C_HH(tau) pole rows with Gram/FV/IR authority land
exact_next_action: Continue accumulating higher-shell chunks as support, but do not reopen source-Higgs closure until canonical O_H/source-overlap authority and strict physical Euclidean C_ss/C_sH/C_HH(tau) pole rows are present.
open_imports: source-Higgs pole residues and Gram purity
complete higher-shell packet and downstream monotonicity/threshold checks, if pursuing the Schur route

parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.chunk001_checkpoint: bounded-support / higher-shell Schur scalar-LSZ chunk001 row checkpoint
parent_statuses.chunk002_checkpoint: bounded-support / higher-shell Schur scalar-LSZ chunk002 row checkpoint
parent_statuses.full_positive_assembly: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.operator_certificate_boundary: exact negative boundary / higher-shell source-Higgs cross rows use the taste-radial second-source certificate, not canonical O_H
parent_statuses.physical_euclidean_source_higgs_absence: exact negative boundary / tau-keyed production correlators are not physical Euclidean source-Higgs C_ss/C_sH/C_HH(tau) rows
parent_statuses.source_higgs_gram_postprocess: open / O_sp-Higgs Gram-purity postprocess awaiting production certificate
parent_statuses.source_higgs_pole_extractor: open / source-Higgs pole-residue extractor awaiting valid production rows
parent_statuses.source_higgs_readiness: open / source-Higgs production launch blocked by missing O_H certificate
parent_statuses.wave_launcher: run-control / higher-shell Schur scalar-LSZ wave launcher status; active/launched jobs and partial completed higher-shell packets are not closure evidence

proposal_allowed_reason: Chunks001-002 are completed bounded support rows under the taste-radial second-source certificate.  They do not identify x with canonical O_H, do not supply pole residues or a time kernel, do not derive scalar LSZ/FV/IR authority, and do not enable the full positive closure or campaign gates.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat chunks001-002 as a complete higher-shell packet
does not treat C_sx/C_xx aliases as canonical C_sH/C_HH
does not treat finite-momentum rows as pole-residue rows
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, y_t_bare, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
